assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: Response includes specific commands to check for deprecated APIs: 'kubectl get events --all-namespaces | grep -i "deprecated\|removed"' and mentions Kubernetes 1.32 removed several beta APIs

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response specifically mentions 'Admission webhook timeouts - Custom webhooks not responding' as a likely root cause and includes checking admission controller changes

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes resource constraint checks with 'kubectl top nodes' and 'kubectl describe nodes | grep -A 5 "Allocated resources"' and mentions resource exhaustion as a root cause

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes multiple commands to check kube-system pods: 'kubectl get pods -n kube-system -l component=kube-apiserver', etcd checks, and CNI pod checks

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: While the response includes 'kubectl get --raw /healthz -v=6' and 'kubectl top pods', it does not include the specific 'kubectl get --raw /metrics' command for API server metrics

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes network plugin checks, NetworkPolicy commands 'kubectl get networkpolicies --all-namespaces', and service mesh checks for Istio

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get events' commands to check for various issues and 'kubectl get pods --all-namespaces | grep -v Running' to identify problematic pods

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) checks or their potential behavioral changes in the new version
